_meta.deso: 0180C3130 (Stockholm/Södermalm), year 2025 — captured live with the corrected body (Upplatelseform + ContentsCode + Tid)
_meta.note: Redacted from a real live SCB response. The four COMPONENT upplåtelseform codes are selected (NOT the TOTALT aggregate, which would otherwise be summed into the tenure mix — WR-04). ÄG/ANDEL is null here (SCB cell suppression) so the fixture also exercises the null-cell-tolerance of the normalizer. Population/income dimensions are intentionally absent so this fixture isolates the tenure metric.

label: Number of persons by region, tenure, observations and year
